WORKSHEET #7 - Find Your Professional Story
Choose the first professional story you want to tell. This will be the story that you
will work on throughout this module.
Ideas for this story include:
What is the origin story for your company?
How did you and your cofounder, partner, or key investor meet?
How did you get to the job you have today?
What was one of your most challenging experiences in the workplace?
What is the next big leap that your company is preparing to make?
